title: The Golden Rule
content:
Once there was a village where people were not very kind to each other. They argued and complained, and nobody seemed happy.

One day, a wise old woman came to the village. She gathered all the children together.

"I will teach you a secret," she said. "It is called the Golden Rule."

"What is it?" asked the children.

"Treat others the way you want to be treated," she said.

A boy named Tom thought about this. He didn't like it when other children laughed at him. So he decided to never laugh at others.

A girl named Sara remembered how sad she felt when no one shared with her. So she began sharing her toys and treats.

Slowly, the children changed. They said kind words. They helped each other. They took turns and played fair.

The grown-ups noticed the change. "What has happened?" they asked.

"We learned the Golden Rule," said the children. "Treat others the way you want to be treated."

The grown-ups began following the rule too. Soon, the whole village was different.

People smiled more. They helped their neighbors. Arguments became rare.

The wise old woman smiled. "You have learned the most important lesson of all," she said.

And from that day on, the village was known as the kindest place in all the land.

The End.
